CustomField.description: Aggregate - LLP MR calculated based on the Assembly MR Rate record for LLPs Per LLP - LLP MR calculated at each LLP based on its cost per cycle
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Aggregate - LLP MR calculated based on the Assembly MR Rate record for LLPs Per LLP - LLP MR calculated at each LLP based on its cost per cycle
CustomField.label: Z_Unused_2306 LLP MR Rate Configuration
